assertions.description: INCORRECT: The analyzer reports power_rails=['+RX', '+TX', 'GND'] for this sheet. The +RX and +TX nets are differential RS-422 signal lines driven by the DS89C21 transceiver — they are not power supply rails. The same misclassification appears in hardware_Operator_Operator.sch which reports power_rails=['+RX', '+Tx', 'GND']. KiCad 5 legacy schematics use PWR_FLAG symbols to mark power nets, but the naming convention (+signal) appears to have triggered a false positive in the power rail heuristic.
